headline: Norfolk Southern to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
summary: NSC heads into Q1 earnings with falling estimates and weak freight demand, even as e-commerce shipments and pricing offer partial support.

headline: Analysts Estimate Norfolk Southern (NSC) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
summary: Norfolk Southern (NSC) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
